metadata.title: SpyCloud - Revoke OAuth Consent
metadata.description: Revokes all delegated OAuth permission grants for compromised users, removing third-party application access to their mailbox, files, and other M365 resources. Also revokes sign-in sessions to invalidate cached tokens. Critical for incidents where attackers may have granted malicious app consent.
prerequisites: Managed Identity requires DelegatedPermissionGrant.ReadWrite.All and User.ReadWrite.All
AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All for app role assignment audit
postDeployment: Grant the Logic App managed identity required Graph API permissions
Review revoked consent list for legitimate applications that need re-consent
Test with a non-production account first
